text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While out shopping, I come across a<n>pop-up
market for products from<n>Morioka. I'm taking a
cursory look<n>around, when...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Welcome t'the Trav'lin Morioka<n>Fest'val! Come
take a look!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
S'right! We're here t'introduce<n>Morioka's
traditions 'n' fest'vities.<n>You could call this shop
Moriokan<n>"pee ar"!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of Moriokan fest'vals,<n>don't forget
'bout the sansa odori!<n>Sakkora! ♪ Choiw—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oof! S-s-s-so sorry! I didn't s—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're a train'r from Tracen,<n>aren't you!
Terribly sorry for bump'n<n>into you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I-it is! It's called the sansa odori. It's<n>a tradition'l
dance acc'mpanied by<n>taiko drums.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to learn, so folks of all ages<n>dance it all
th'time at school field days<n>'n' local events 'n'
such.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
People even dance down th'street<n>during
festivals like a p'rade. There's<n>even a contest
every year t'see who<n>boogies it th'best!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of other chain dances<n>and such
as well that anyone can<n>join! It's more fun than
a barr'l of<n>monkeys!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Just talking about it really takes me<n>back...
Ev'ryone's hearts united as<n>one...
choice_data_list: You must really love sansa odori.
You must really love sansa odori.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... You can say that again! I love<n>it like
peanut butt'r loves jelly!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, you haven't changed a<n>whit... Thinking
that, I can't help but<n>feel bad...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Well... Take a look around. At the rate<n>business is
goin' t'day, I might hafta<n>throw in the towel...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
N-now that you mention it, there<n>haven't been
any custom'rs.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Guess we got noth'ng that stands<n>out t'these
big city folk. And I wanted<n>to bring good news
back to all th'folks<n>back home who helped with
th'prep<n>and what have ya...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
What a cryin' shame! There's so<n>much good
stuff here! If they'd only<n>just take a look...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let me try talk'n to<n>people! I'll draw
in custom'rs<n>somehow!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Yukino...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ev'ryone's worked so hard, I wanna<n>help out
too!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you kindly. You've always<n>been such a
peach. I don't want you<n>to push yourself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Er... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, thanks! I'm not givin' up.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: There's gotta be a good way. Hm...<n>Hmmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin racks her brain for ideas<n>all the way
back to her dorm.
